old_value: {"id":"smallhold-8e8","title":"Tracing and logging setup","description":"Configure tracing + tracing-subscriber for structured logging. Log level controlled by RUST_LOG env var. INFO level: activity type + target + HTTP status. Full request/response bodies only at TRACE. Never log tokens, never log full activity bodies at INFO. Include request ID in log spans.","design":"tracing-subscriber with EnvFilter from RUST_LOG. Use #[tracing::instrument] on handler functions. Tower TraceLayer for HTTP request logging. Span fields: request_id (uuid), method, path, status.","acceptance_criteria":"Server logs incoming requests with method, path, status, and latency at INFO; RUST_LOG=trace shows full details; tokens are never visible in any log output; startup logs include listen address and domain","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-22T23:58:50Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-22T23:58:50Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-6sk","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T16:58:52Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
